overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Assassin's Creed Origins showing the protagonist Bayek running through an ancient Egyptian stone quarry construction site. The scene features large white limestone blocks, wooden scaffolding, and scattered workers under bright desert sunlight with clear skies.

scene_state.functional_zone: ancient Egyptian quarry base with stone blocks and scaffolding

agents.ego_description: running through the flat quarry base passing large white stone blocks and wooden structures

entered.detail: large rectangular white limestone block with rope bindings
tall wooden crane structure with ropes and beams
large wooden crane tower with counterweight
group of palm trees marking the quarry edge
ancient Egyptian structures with flat roofs in the distance

segments.scene_description: The character runs through the base of an ancient Egyptian quarry, passing large white limestone blocks and wooden scaffolding towers. The ground is sandy dirt with scattered construction debris, and palm trees are visible in the distance against a clear blue sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: quarry approach with wooden ramp and rocky hill base

events.description: character turns slightly left toward the wooden ramp at the hill base
reaching the base of the wooden stairs ascending the rocky hillside

agents.ego_description: approaching the wooden ramp and beginning the ascent toward the rocky hill

notable_agents.action: worker standing near stone blocks watching the character pass

entered.detail: wooden log ramp leading up to the hillside stairs
steep rocky terrain with reddish stone rising ahead
bright sun creating lens flare as the character turns toward it

segments.scene_description: The character approaches the base of a rocky hill where a wooden ramp and stairs begin. The sun becomes prominent in the frame creating a bright glare, and a quarry worker stands visible on the left side near stone blocks.

events.description: character begins ascending the wooden log stairs up the steep rocky hill
passing a worker crouching near wooden fortifications on the right

agents.ego_description: climbing the wooden log stairs up the quarry hillside, passing workers and wooden fortifications

notable_agents.action: worker crouching near wooden fence on the hillside

entered.detail: steep staircase made of wooden logs embedded in the rocky slope
wooden barrier with diagonal supports along the path edge
tall ancient stone column with spherical top
red flag marking the top of the quarry ascent

segments.scene_description: The character ascends a steep wooden staircase built into the rocky hillside, surrounded by reddish stone terrain and wooden fortifications. A worker crouches near the path on the right, and ancient stone pillars become visible as the character climbs toward the upper quarry area marked by flags.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through the base of an ancient Egyptian quarry that gradually ascends a rocky hillside toward an upper construction plateau. It begins with the character running across sandy dirt past massive white limestone blocks and towering wooden scaffolding under a clear blue sky. As the character approaches the foot of a rocky hill, the scene shifts toward a wooden ramp and stairs while a bright solar glare intensifies in the frame. The camera then follows the ascent up a steep wooden staircase built into reddish stone terrain, passing crouching workers and ancient pillars. The movement finally culminates as the character climbs toward the upper quarry area marked by fluttering flags.
